scope: canonical unlock-flow specification for result monetization

states.name: not_eligible
states.trigger: session or persona is not eligible for deep-report monetization.
states.required_rendering_behavior: Hide checkout entry; show free result only and a neutral explanation.
states.failure_retry_behavior: No retry required; user may continue in free mode.

states.name: teaser_only
states.trigger: teaser is available but the payload is not yet at paywall entry or entitlement boundary.
states.required_rendering_behavior: Show teaser and locked naming; no purchase prompt beyond a soft preview.
states.failure_retry_behavior: Proceed to result_ready or wait for paywall_visible depending on product path.

states.name: paywall_visible
states.trigger: deep report exists and the user is eligible to see a monetized unlock prompt.
states.required_rendering_behavior: Show paywall prompt, price/entitlement area, and locked deep-report teaser only.
states.failure_retry_behavior: Allow retry to checkout or return to result without changing persona state.

states.name: checkout_initiated
states.required_rendering_behavior: Show checkout handoff / pending state; keep result text read-only.
states.failure_retry_behavior: Return to paywall_visible or checkout_pending after handoff outcome.

states.name: checkout_pending
states.trigger: provider callback or client confirmation is pending.
states.required_rendering_behavior: Show pending status and preserve all locked text fields.
states.failure_retry_behavior: Poll or re-check confirmation; no state mutation until confirmed.

states.name: payment_succeeded
states.trigger: provider confirmation indicates a successful payment.
states.required_rendering_behavior: Show success confirmation and transition to unlock_granted only after server-side validation.
states.failure_retry_behavior: If validation fails, fall back to unlock_failed; do not show premium body yet.

states.name: unlock_granted
states.trigger: server-side validation confirms entitlement and unlock permission.
states.required_rendering_behavior: Render unlocked deep-report content and preserve locked naming and dimension semantics.
states.failure_retry_behavior: If report fields are missing, show fallback locked state and retry validation.

states.name: unlock_failed
states.required_rendering_behavior: Show failure state with retry or support path; keep deep report locked.
states.failure_retry_behavior: Allow retry or restore path without mutating persona identity.

states.name: deep_report_available
states.trigger: unlock_granted is confirmed and report content is present.
states.required_rendering_behavior: Render premium deep report sections in read-only form.
states.failure_retry_behavior: If content is absent, fall back to unlock_granted/locked state with retry.

states.name: restore_purchase_available if applicable later
states.trigger: future restore flow is supported by the product and entitlement record exists.
states.required_rendering_behavior: Show restore option only when later implementation supports it.
cta_forbidden: purchase new entitlement if restore is enough
states.failure_retry_behavior: If unsupported, hide restore and fall back to paywall_visible.

states.name: version_guard_blocked
states.trigger: payload or unlock metadata version does not match the current contract.
states.required_rendering_behavior: Block unlock and ask for reload or refresh.
states.failure_retry_behavior: Reload the current contract before retrying.

states.name: invalid_session_blocked
states.trigger: session or payload integrity is invalid or missing.
states.required_rendering_behavior: Block unlock flow and show safe recovery only.
states.failure_retry_behavior: Restart session flow; do not attempt payment without a valid session.

unlock_flow.action: show teaser and short result summary
restore purchase or verify prior unlock

non_override_rules: No payment flow may mutate persona_id, label, subtitle, teaser text, or dimension meaning.
Payment flow may only change unlock-related state fields.
No website surface may become the primary unlock path unless explicitly approved later.
No downstream consumer may fork the result payload contract.
No payment state may create parallel alternate result objects.
future_payment_integration_boundary: Provider, pricing, tax, receipt, and wallet details are deferred to implementation
